rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §39.02302, which governs advisory committees for state assessment instruments. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 39.02302. ADVISORY COMMITTEES FOR ASSESSMENT INSTRUMENTS.
_note: Rule text concerns educational assessment advisory committees; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
